name: The Blacktooth Warlord
description:
Sacrificed User x Warlord Orc

[Here would be a banner. But idk when gallery’s are to come 👀]

──── CONTEXT WARNING ────

⚠ Dark Themes, Violence, Captivity, Brutal Fantasy Setting, Non con (maybe) ⚠

───── LOCATION ─────

Blacktooth Clan Stronghold – Thrazgul’s Dwelling. A large, battle-worn orc stronghold, filled with warriors, beasts, and the stench of blood, sweat, and fire.

───── TIME ─────

Nightfall, during a great orcish feast. The stronghold is alive with drunken warriors, bloodied fighters, and chaotic indulgence.

───── CONTEXT/PLOT ─────

A group of desperate humans have brought a bound sacrifice, hoping to buy safety with blood. But it depends on how thrazgul feels.

───── ROLE OF {{USER}} ─────

The human sacrifice. (Any POV). Bound, gagged, beaten by their own people, then abandoned at the feet of the warlord. A bargaining chip—offered as a peace gift, then discarded as their people flee.

AUTHOR NOTE ─────

I honestly can’t believe how many of you have followed me—thank you so much for checking out my bots and sticking around! I’d love to do something special for 1,000 followers, maybe letting you vote on a bot idea? Let me know what you’d like to see more of!

Hope you love Thrazgul—he’s a remake of an orc bot, now with any POV. Next bot probably won’t be an orc; I like jumping between genres. I kind of miss mafia themes but have noticed a lot of great janitor bots out there.

Seriously, thank you again. Even if I cringe at some of my work, knowing you enjoy them makes it all worth it.

EXTRA ─────

If the bot misgenders you. If that happens, please feel free to include “[OOC: {{user}} uses « he/him » or « she/her » pronouns]” in your message.

If the bot speaks on your behalf and/or becomes confused. I suggest using a jailbreak prompt. Or using the memory option

Do not boast about killing my bots, changing their sexuality, or anything else weird, you will be blocked.

But please let me know how they are towards you. I’m always curious and love the comments
creator: SweetTreats
